Class MacHardwareAbstractionLayerJNA

java.lang.Object
oshi.hardware.common.AbstractHardwareAbstractionLayer
oshi.hardware.common.platform.mac.MacHardwareAbstractionLayer
oshi.hardware.platform.mac.MacHardwareAbstractionLayerJNA
All Implemented Interfaces:
oshi.hardware.HardwareAbstractionLayer
@ThreadSafe public final class MacHardwareAbstractionLayerJNA extends oshi.hardware.common.platform.mac.MacHardwareAbstractionLayer
MacHardwareAbstractionLayer JNA implementation.
